name: Faucet Installation
lead: A new faucet ought to be a small morning pleasure for years, not a regret with a handle.
paras: We handle faucet installation for {city} kitchens, bathrooms, and utility sinks — mounted square, sealed tight, shut-off valves checked, and leak-tested before we call it finished. Bring your own fixture or let us help you choose one.
The hard water out here is rough on cheap internals, so listen to an old hand: buy the faucet built to survive the desert, not the one that just looks pretty in the box.

name: Faucet Repair
lead: That dripping faucet is quietly padding your water bill — and drips don't fix themselves.
paras: Most faucet trouble comes down to a handful of worn parts — cartridges, stems, seats, O-rings — and we carry the common ones on the truck, so a leaking or noisy {city} faucet, kitchen sink or bathtub, usually gets fixed in one visit.
If the fixture's too far gone, we'll say so honestly and set a new one in its place right then. You'll get the truthful read on repair versus replace before a dollar changes hands — the old way.

name: Faucet Replacement
lead: When a faucet is corroded, discontinued, or plain worn out, replacing it beats fighting it — no shame in that.
paras: We take out the old fixture and set a new, high-quality one in its place — kitchen, bathroom faucet replacement, bathtub faucet, or utility sink — mounting cleaned up, supply lines fresh, everything sealed and leak-tested.
The water in {city} makes short work of flimsy fittings. Choose one built for the desert and it'll pour faithfully for a long, long time — I've got fixtures older than my truck to prove the point.

name: Plumbing Leak Detection
lead: A hidden water leak is patient. We're more patient.
paras: Leak detection done right is careful, stubborn work — acoustic listening equipment, pressure testing, moisture readings — following the evidence until we can point to the exact spot instead of guessing at it. Nobody should tear open a wall on a hunch.

Under a slab, behind a drywall seam, out along the yard line — wherever it's hiding in a {city} home, the job is the same: stay on it until it's found, then hand you a clean, honest repair plan. That's what having a crew in your corner is for.

name: Plumbing Leak Repair
lead: Water damage compounds by the hour — so once a leak is found, we finish it.
paras: We repair leaks in pipes, fixtures, and water lines with as little disruption to the walls, flooring, and slab around them as the job allows. Leak repair is precision work: open exactly what needs opening, fix what's broken, seal it.
Then we test it under pressure before we call it done — because the only acceptable outcome for a {city} home is a repair that holds, the first time.

name: Plumbing Pipe Repair
lead: Age, corrosion, or one unlucky freeze — whatever broke the pipe, we put it back together right.
paras: We repair copper, PEX, and PVC piping wherever it fails in a {city} home: inside walls, overhead in ceilings, buried under the slab. Even frozen pipes — rare as a hard freeze is out here — get the same treatment: clean pipe repair, correct materials, pressure-tested.
If a run of pipe is genuinely at the end of its life, we'll say so straight and lay out the options. What we won't do is dress up a tired line and wish it luck.

name: Shower Installation
lead: A great shower starts with the valve behind the tile, friend — not the shiny head in the showroom.
paras: We install shower valves, shower heads, hand showers, and complete systems for new {city} bathrooms, remodels, and tub-to-shower conversions — plumbed to deliver the pressure and temperature you were promised.
Take the time to size it right at the start and the morning shower stays a pleasure for decades. That's not salesmanship; that's just how good plumbing ages.

name: Shower Repair
lead: A shower that won't hold its temperature — or won't quit dripping — isn't something anyone should live with.
paras: We handle {city} shower repair of every stripe: leaking showers, worn shower valves, shower faucet replacement, and the mixing-valve trouble behind scalds and cold surprises.
If the leak's hiding behind the wall, we'll find it carefully and fix it properly — patient work, done once, done right, so your bathroom stays dry behind the tile where you can't see.

name: Toilet Installation
lead: A toilet installation looks simple right up until the flange is cracked or the floor isn't level — we've seen both a hundred times.
paras: We install standard, comfort-height, dual-flush, wall-hung, and commercial toilets across {city}, set with a proper wax ring seal and fully leak-tested before we gather our tools.
Swapping an old water-guzzler for a modern one pays off fast on the water bill — and we'll steer you to a model that clears the bowl on the first flush, every flush. Small dignities matter.

name: Toilet Repair
lead: A running toilet can waste more water than every other fixture in the house combined — it's the quietest expensive thing you own.
paras: We repair standard toilets, dual-flush systems, wall-hung units, and commercial flushometer valves all over {city}. Running toilet, clogged toilet, leaking, rocking — we find the actual cause first and fix that, not just the symptom on top.
Water around the base gets treated seriously the moment we see it, since that means water's getting under the flooring with every flush. Some things can wait; that isn't one.

name: Water Heater Installation
lead: The right water heater isn't always the one that was there before — sit down, let's think it through together.
paras: We handle water heater installation of every stripe — tank, tankless, hybrid heat pump, solar, high-efficiency — sized to how your {city} household actually uses hot water, not just a like-for-like swap. And we'll talk installation cost plainly before a wrench comes out.
Out here the hard water is tough on a poorly matched unit, so choosing carefully the first time is the whole trick. Measure twice, install once — that's how my father did it, and it still holds.

name: Water Heater Repair
lead: No hot water this morning? Sit down a minute, friend — I've been listening to water heaters complain since before color TV, and most of them can be talked back to work.
paras: Water heater repair is usually a smaller job than folks fear. A worn heating element, a tired thermostat, a pilot light that won't hold — gas or electric, tank or tankless, it's a part more often than it's the whole appliance. And a water heater leaking at a fitting is a different story from one leaking out of the tank itself: the first is a fix, the second is a conversation.

Out here in {city}, the hard water ages a tank faster than the calendar does — I've watched it my whole life. So we'll tell you straight, the way a neighbor should: if a repair earns its keep, we'll do it right, and if it won't, we'll say so plain. No guessing, no upselling. That's the old way, and it still works.

name: Water Heater Replacement
lead: When a water heater starts leaking from the tank itself, that's not a repair — that's the tank giving its notice.
paras: We handle hot water heater replacement start to finish: haul the old unit out, set the new high-efficiency tank or tankless model in right, sized correctly and installed to current code. You'll get a straight answer on water heater replacement cost before anything begins — no surprises at the end.

Replacement day is also the day to fix whatever the old {city} setup got wrong — the valve that never existed, the drain pan that always should have. Do it proper once, and the years ahead take care of themselves.

name: Drain Cleaning
lead: A clogged drain doesn't quit on its own. Neither do we — that's the whole arrangement.
paras: Here's how we work: professional drain cleaning equipment — hydro jetting rigs, commercial-grade machines, not the drugstore drain snake that gives up halfway — and we don't call a line clear until it's clear end to end. Kitchen sink drains, shower drains, sewer lines, grease traps; {city} homes, restaurants, and commercial buildings alike.
Snaking a drain is the easy part. Knowing why it clogged, clearing the whole run, and leaving the job finished so it stays finished — that's the part we never skip.

name: Garbage Disposal Installation
lead: A properly installed garbage disposal is quiet, leak-free, and doesn't trip the breaker.
paras: We install new garbage disposals with the mounting, drain reconnection, dishwasher tie-in, and electrical connections done right the first time — bring your own unit or let us size one to how your {city} kitchen actually cooks.
It's a small job that rewards doing thoroughly. A little extra care under the sink is the difference between an appliance you forget about and one you think about every day.

name: Garbage Disposal Repair
lead: A jammed, humming, or leaking garbage disposal usually isn't dead — it's asking for a proper repair.
paras: We repair jammed, leaking, and malfunctioning disposals and troubleshoot the electrical and plumbing connections behind them — actual diagnosis first, recommendations second.

If the unit truly is beyond saving, we'll say so plainly and install a new garbage disposal the same visit. Either way, your {city} kitchen ends the day working, with a straight answer to show for it.

name: Outdoor Plumbing System Repair
lead: The plumbing running through a desert yard takes a beating you never see — sun, soil, and the occasional shovel.
paras: We repair leaking outdoor faucets and hose bibbs, exterior shutoff valves, yard hydrants, and damaged outdoor water lines across {city} — wherever they've cracked, corroded, or been nicked by landscaping.
Desert sun ages rubber and plastic on its own schedule. We fix what failed and give the rest of the system a hard look while we're there, so the whole yard leaves our hands in working order.

name: Pool Plumbing Installation
lead: Out here a backyard pool is practically standard equipment — and the plumbing behind it deserves the same care as the water in front.
paras: We install pool pumps, filters, valves, and underground pool plumbing for new {city} builds and renovations, sized and routed clean to your equipment pad.
Pool plumbing set in right the first time runs quiet for years — and out here, a pool that just works all summer is worth its weight in shade.

name: Pool Plumbing Repair
lead: When a pool is losing water faster than the desert sun can explain, the plumbing's usually the one to ask.
paras: We repair and replace {city} pool pumps, filters, valves, and underground pool lines — isolating suction-side and return-side leaks methodically before anyone thinks about cutting into the deck.
A simple bucket test separates evaporation from a real leak; from there we work patient and precise until the answer's certain. Pools are for floating, friend, not fretting.

name: Sewer Cleaning
lead: When every drain in the house backs up at once, the sewer main is picking a fight. Fine by us.
paras: We clear sewer line blockages, tree roots, and years of buildup with high-pressure hydro jetting — scouring the pipe walls clean instead of poking a hole through the clog and calling it a day.

Mature trees and older clay lines are a tough combination in {city}, same as anywhere in the Valley. We'll show you exactly what we found and what we cleared, so you know the job is done — completely.

name: Sewer Repair
lead: Nobody plans on sewer line repair — but if it's happening in your yard, it's getting done right.
paras: We pinpoint the exact failure first — camera down the line, location marked — so the repair is targeted instead of a guess-and-dig job across your {city} yard. Trenchless sewer repair is on the table whenever the pipe and site allow it.

Digging into a sewer main is serious work, and serious work rewards patience: we don't rush the diagnosis, we don't cut corners on the bedding and backfill, and we don't leave until the line runs the way it should.

name: Sump Pump Installation
lead: A sump pump sits quiet for months — then monsoon season asks it for everything at once. It has to answer.
paras: We install primary sump pumps, battery backup systems, and large commercial sump pumps for {city} basements, elevator pits, window wells, and low-lying patios — sized for the storm you'll actually get, not the average one.
Preparation is the whole game here: the right pump, a backup that takes over when the power quits, and a full wet test before we pack up. When the big storm shows up, you're ready.

name: Sump Pump Repair
lead: A sump pump that hums, short-cycles, or never shuts off is telling you something — listen before the next monsoon makes the point louder.
paras: We repair and service primary pumps, battery backup systems, and large commercial units, testing the whole pit — float switch, check valve, discharge line — not just confirming the light turns on.
If yours hasn't run in living memory, a pre-monsoon checkup is cheap insurance for a {city} property. We'd rather find a tired pump on a sunny day than have you find it on a flooded one.

name: Water Tank Installation
lead: A water storage tank only earns its keep if it's sized and set up right on day one — so that's how we do it.
paras: We install pressure tanks, expansion tanks, and large storage tanks for {city} well systems and commercial buildings, matched to the system they're actually serving — not whatever was on sale.

An undersized tank is one of those quiet troublemakers behind short-cycling pumps and hammering pipes. Get the sizing right at the start and the whole system runs easier for years — old rule, still true.

name: Water Tank Repair
lead: A tired pressure tank rarely announces itself — it just makes everything around it work harder, like a fence post rotting quiet.
paras: We repair pressure tanks, expansion tanks, and large storage tanks all over {city} — checking precharge, bladder, and fittings carefully, so nothing gets replaced that didn't need replacing.
Tending to it early protects the expensive equipment downstream, your pump and your water heater both. A small fix at the right time is the cheapest fix there is.

name: New Installation
lead: New construction plumbing is the trade nobody notices when it's done right — which is exactly the compliment we're after.
paras: We plumb new {city} homes, commercial buildings, remodels, and tenant improvements complete — from underground rough-in to the last finished fixture.

Slab construction and hard water both shape the smart choices out here, and the right decision at rough-in costs pennies compared to changing your mind after the concrete's poured. Plan it right, pour once, live easy.

name: Underground Gas Leak Detection & Repair
lead: A gas smell outdoors deserves urgent attention — no wait-and-see, no shortcuts.
paras: If you smell gas strongly, step away and call the gas company's emergency line first. Once the site is safe, we take over: specialized detection equipment to locate the underground gas leak precisely, then a code-compliant gas line repair — whether the line feeds a {city} house, a pool heater, or a built-in BBQ.
Gas work is the one arena where 'close enough' doesn't exist. We locate exactly, repair completely, and test thoroughly before anything gets buried again.

name: Grease Trap Cleaning
lead: A neglected grease trap will pick its own moment to shut a kitchen down — always the worst one.
paras: We handle grease trap cleaning for {city} restaurants and commercial kitchens on a schedule matched to your actual volume, keeping the line clear and the health department satisfied.
It's not glamorous work. It's necessary work, done thoroughly, on schedule, every time — which is exactly why your kitchen never has to think about it.

name: Water Softener Installation
lead: Out here, a water softener isn't a luxury — it's cheap insurance for every pipe and appliance downstream.
paras: We install water softeners and salt delivery systems sized to a {city} household's actual water use — because an overworked little unit and an oversized showpiece both waste your money.
I've watched this desert's hard water chew through fixtures my whole life. Soften it at the door and everything behind it — heater, faucets, glassware — lives an easier, longer life.

name: Water Softener Repair
lead: If the glassware's gone spotty, your water softener has quietly stopped pulling its weight.
paras: We service and repair water softeners and salt delivery systems across {city} — salt bridges, resin trouble, stuck control valves; the usual suspects, and all of them fixable when caught early.
If the unit's genuinely at the end of its road, we'll say so plain and help you choose its successor wisely. Either way, you'll know exactly where you stand before a dollar moves.

name: Reverse Osmosis Units
lead: If you're still hauling bottled water home, friend, an under-sink reverse osmosis system pays for itself quicker than you'd think.
paras: We install under-sink drinking water systems and larger commercial reverse osmosis units across {city} — clean, better-tasting water straight from your own tap.

Desert tap water carries a heavier mineral load than most; that's just the land talking. An RO unit is the most direct fix for the taste, and one of those small upgrades a household feels every single day.

name: Commercial Kitchen Plumbing
lead: A commercial kitchen's plumbing is a production line — when one piece goes down, the whole line feels it.
paras: We install and maintain commercial plumbing for {city} restaurants and commercial kitchens: sinks, grease traps, dishwashers, stainless steel under-counter work — built for the pace and the health code both.
We know a dinner rush and a health inspection wait for nobody. So the work gets done thoroughly, the schedule gets respected, and your kitchen keeps cooking.

name: Backflow Preventer Installation
lead: A backflow preventer is the one device standing between the clean water supply and whatever's sitting in your irrigation or fire lines — it gets installed like it matters.
paras: We install backflow prevention devices for {city} homes and businesses, sized and configured to code and set up properly for the annual testing that follows.
This is quiet, unglamorous protection — and exactly the kind of work where thoroughness now means the test signs off without drama later.

name: Backflow Preventer Repair
lead: A failed backflow test usually comes with a deadline attached. Good — we work well with deadlines.
paras: We repair and test {city} backflow prevention devices to keep them code-compliant — worn check valves and relief valves are the usual culprits, and they're very fixable.
We diagnose precisely, repair completely, and retest before we leave, so the paperwork goes through and the device goes back to being something you never think about.

name: Whole House Water Filtration
lead: One whole house water filtration system at the point of entry, and every tap in the house benefits — that's good arithmetic.
paras: We install high-capacity filtration systems that pull sediment, chlorine, and other unwelcome guests out of every drop entering a {city} home.
Pair it with a softener and you've addressed this desert's water the thorough way — filtered and softened once, at the door, instead of fixture by fixture forever.

name: Backflow Cage Installation
lead: The most exposed plumbing a property owns is the backflow assembly sitting out front in plain view — a steel cage is its cheapest insurance.
paras: Copper theft is a fact of life wherever valuable metal sits out in the open. That's why we install protective cages and enclosures around backflow devices — anchored to meet city code and built to discourage anyone with bolt cutters and bad intentions.
Sized right, the cage still leaves full access for the testing and upkeep every {city} assembly needs. The hardware stays protected, accessible, and exactly where it belongs — permanently.

name: Emergency Plumbing
lead: Plumbing emergencies don't check the clock — and an emergency plumber shouldn't either. We're on call around the clock.
paras: Burst pipes, blocked drains, failed water heaters, gas leaks, overflowing toilets, flooding — whatever broke, our emergency plumbing services cover {city} day or night, any day of the week.
In a bad moment you want a crew that stays calm, works the problem, and sees it through until it's genuinely fixed. That's the standard, every call.
